title: What Am I Listening To?
description: A client-side mod for showing a toast when the game music changes.
body:
# What Am I Listening To?

### Requires [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)!

WAILT is a small, client-side utility mod that displays a toast on-screen when the game music changes, with support for music from other mods as well!

![A screenshot of the main menu of Minecraft, with a toast in the upper right-hand corner showing the current song playing to be Floating Trees by C418](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/818f77a29fe3c44c86a7327686cd2defc878ae7f.png)

Supported mods, beyond Minecraft:
- [The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone)

## Contribute track information

If WAILT doesn't support music added by a mod, it's easy to add it yourself if you have some familiarity with JSON!
Documentation on how to do that can be found [here](https://github.com/GlyphMods/wailt/blob/1.20.6/CONTRIBUTING.md).
